title: RED THREAD: The Trojan Horse dilemma
summary_full: Welcome to Red Thread, Euractiv’s weekly newsletter on the EU’s relationship with China and the wider Asia-Pacific. I’m Christina Zhao in Oceania, joined by Anupriya Datta in Europe. This week, we look at Beijing’s growing influence in the Western Balkans… Chinese President Xi Jinping and Serbian President Aleksandar Vučić (Photo by Tingshu Wang via Getty Images) Montenegro and Serbia have spent […]
